name: ABC Transport School Bus LLC
principals: Carmelo Rivera (listed DBE owner, 3399 Boggy Creek Rd, Kissimmee)
districts_or_customers: likely Osceola County / Kissimmee-area private school routes
recent_news: Florida DOT DBE program record shows a decertification decision on ABC Transport School Bus LLC; otherwise no public M&A or news. Sunbiz LLC remains active.
fit_notes: Micro single-location operator (~21 employees, ~$0.9M rev) in Kissimmee/Osceola; DBE decertification is a yellow flag. Too small to be a standalone tuck-in but could be a bolt-on driver/route acquisition for an existing Summit Florida footprint.

name: Atlantic City Bus Co Inc
recent_news: No news, M&A, or notable public coverage found tying the entity to Volusia County Schools' transportation business partners list.
fit_notes: Tiny Edgewater FL operator with a residential-style HQ; data quality is weak (no website, no phone). Possibly a paper/holding entity rather than an active fleet operator. Low-priority tuck-in candidate pending direct outreach to confirm operations.

name: Carlos & Maty School Bus LLC
recent_news: Florida LLC filed 2023-03-31, active status; no M&A or news coverage.
fit_notes: Very new (2023) micro family LLC in Hialeah; ~$0.8M revenue, 18 employees. Far below typical Summit tuck-in threshold; only relevant as part of a Miami-Dade roll-up of multiple sub-scale Hispanic family operators.

name: Happy Angels School Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Lake County / Clermont private-school or daycare routes (likely)
recent_news: No public news, M&A, or contract awards found.
fit_notes: Single-location ~20-employee operator run from a residential Clermont address; profile fits a small daycare/private-school shuttle service rather than a public district contractor. Marginal as a Summit tuck-in; useful only as a driver/route add-on in Central FL.

name: Rockwood Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: Rockwood Area School District and/or Meyersdale Area School District, Somerset County PA (likely)
recent_news: FMCSA snapshot (2026) shows 47 power units / 28 drivers, intrastate-style private passenger carrier; PA Corp active since 2001. No M&A activity surfaced.
fit_notes: Genuine independent, family/owner-operator school-bus contractor in Somerset County PA with a real 47-bus fleet (much larger than the revenue-est suggests) and 25+ year tenure under one owner. Strong rural PA tuck-in profile for Summit: owner age/succession likely, defined small-district customer base, and minimal competition for the route.
